title: Bridge Essay: Extraordinary nature and human recovery: Psychological and physiological perspectives.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — nature connectedness, biophilia, environmental neuroscience.
**Phase context:** Nature connectedness, biophilia, environmental neuroscience.

**Extraordinary nature and human recovery: Psychological and physiological perspectives.** — J Environ Manage (2025). DOI: 10.1016/j.jenvman.2024.123661. PMID: 39673850. The restorative effect of natural environments on human well-being has garnered significant attention in psychology and environmental science. However, extraordinary nature-such as volcanoes, glaciers, and starry skies-has been largely underexplored despite its potential to elicit stronger emotional and physiological responses.
